seoTitle: Woolocutty vs Wooramel — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Woolocutty and Wooramel. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Woolocutty and Wooramel.
heading: Woolocutty vs Wooramel — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woolocutty, Western Australia and Wooramel, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wooramel has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Woolocutty (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woolocutty or Wooramel safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woolocutty has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Wooramel scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woolocutty scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Wooramel scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woolocutty or Wooramel?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wooramel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
